posts.author: slovak82 (Rostyslav )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all! Faced that, we need a solution that can provide us such thing:

We have a board with two columns: name and status
We have a second board with a column “name” too.

The idea is if we enter value (name) in the first board that exists in the second board, first board has to show “already exist” in the status column.

Will be thanks for any help!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @slovak82!

Hm, I am interested as to whether our match automations could help in some way here - particularly this recipe below:

This will essentially match the two items, and indicate that the item exists in the second board, allowing you to easily observe duplicate items. Because the connect boards columns isn’t currently supported in automations, I am interested if you could utilise a formula column to display specific text when those values match?

Screen Shot 2022-12-12 at 2.34.46 pm1088×542 33.5 KB

Screen Shot 2022-12-12 at 2.34.53 pm746×136 9.65 KB

I’d love to hear your thoughts!
